title: senecio praeruptorum
intro: Senecio praeruptorum, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mountain Ragwort include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio praeruptorum are often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
